subcodes.first_line: Thou art remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and the glance of His loving-kindness is directed towards thee. Thou art among those souls who have attained unto His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور و طرف عنایت بتو متوجه تو از نفوسی هستی که بلقا فائز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God
